headline: Chainguard Launches Athena, the Industry Coalition to Fix Open Source Vulnerabilities Before Attackers Can Find Them
summary: Chainguard, together with BNY, Cisco, Cloudflare, Corridor, DepthFirst, Docker, JPMorganChase, Kyndryl, LTIMindtree, and PwC, today announced Athena, an industry coalition for the orchestrated defense of open source software, built for the frontier-model era where AI systems can find serious flaws faster than anyone can patch them. Athena is operational today with more than two dozen member organizations. To date, it has processed more than 20,000 findings and generated over 2,000 patches across

headline: Workday Bets On Trusted AI Agents And AWS Data Ties To Reignite Growth
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) announced new AI and data features, including the Agent Passport security compliance platform for AI agents. The company introduced new agentic developer tools through the Workday Build platform. Workday Data Cloud is now fully integrated with Amazon Web Services, enabling bi directional data connections. Cisco is partnering with Workday to provide third party validation of AI agent security. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WDAY, these product moves arrive after a...
